title: Server Performance
description: Enhance the overall performance of your server.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab31021f18b4478bb58c4d4f52f189fee37edf81.png)

Discord • Twitter

# The Server Performance Modpack The **Server Performance modpack** is crafted specifically to enhance the performance of **Fabric-based servers**, providing a carefully selected set of the best optimization mods available. Built with **server stability** and **efficiency** in mind, it aims to achieve the **highest possible performance**, allowing servers to run smoothly even under high player loads. > Maximizing your server's potential. > This modpack has been used in streamer events with +100 active users. # Pictures
Spoiler ![picture](https://lunr.pics/i/fS2qxX1N.png)
# Acknowledgment
Spoiler This project is entirely thanks to the developers of these mods who have taken their time to collaborate and create their wonderful mods that allow you to modify configurations of the entire server side.
